# Feedback | Daily Replies + Gate DMs

<callout icon="💬" color="blue_bg">
	**FEEDBACK & REPLIES** | The single most powerful doc for completion | Voice: Matt | All times SGT
</callout>

<callout icon="📌" color="gray_bg">
	**The rule:** never reply "Great job." Always reference the thing they posted and give one next nudge. A reply that proves you read their post is worth ten that don't.
</callout>

## Daily Reply Templates

<details color="gray_bg">
<summary>React to what they posted, Day 1 to Day 13</summary>
	**Day 1 (hello):** Welcome in, <<FirstName>>. Great to have a [their business] in the room. Tomorrow we start building, first job is naming your business in 3 sentences.
	**Day 2:** Love this, <<FirstName>>. "[quote their product line]" is clear, that is exactly what your agent needs to know.
	**Day 3 (profile):** Strong profile. The bit about "[detail]" is the kind of specific your agent will turn into better ideas.
	**Day 4 (customer):** Good, now the agent knows who it is making ideas for. The sharper the customer's problem, the sharper the ideas.
	**Day 5 (voice):** Nice. Now it will sound like you, not a robot. Ask it to write one sentence and check the vibe.
	**Day 6 (idea engine):** This is the big one and you did it. The idea it gave you, "[quote]", is a real starting point.
	**Day 7 (first ideas):** Three ideas from nothing. Which one would you actually post? That instinct is what we will sharpen.
	**Day 9 (prompt):** Now it hands you something you can paste. That is the moment it goes from toy to tool.
	**Day 10 (3 formats):** One idea, three formats, that is a week of content from a single thought.
	**Day 11 (proactive):** Now it greets you with an idea. That is the whole point, no more blank page.
	**Day 12 (polish):** Good polish. Anything that still feels generic, make it name your product or your customer.
	**Day 13 (week in one sitting):** Seven ideas in one go. That is the proof it works. Bring your favorite to Day 14.
</details>

## Gate DMs (send privately, these save completions)

<callout icon="🎥" color="red_bg">
	**Day 8 nudge DM (to anyone who hasn't filmed by about 4pm SGT)**
	<<FirstName>>, saw you have been posting [reference a day], so I know you are in this. The Day 8 video is the only gate that trips people. 2 minutes, phone, no editing, just show one idea your agent made and tell me what is hard. Do it before midnight and you stay in the running.
</callout>

<callout icon="📦" color="red_bg">
	**Day 14 DM (to anyone who hasn't submitted by about 4pm SGT)**
	<<FirstName>>, you are one submission from graduating. Drop your agent (a link or a 60 to 90 sec recording), your one-page brief, and one demo idea in #Day14, three separate boxes on the form. Don't polish it. A working agent beats a perfect plan.
</callout>

<callout icon="🤝" color="orange_bg">
	**Day 15 missed-the-gate DM (recovery)**
	<<FirstName>>, you did not hit the gate, but the agent you built is still yours, and that is the real prize. You are welcome at the Summit Wednesday. Want 30 minutes with me to finish it? Reply "yes."
</callout>

## What Makes Feedback Work

1. Quote their actual post. 2. One next step, not five. 3. Realistic encouragement, "your first agent." 4. Speed beats polish.

---
*The reply rate is the completion rate. AI SCHOOL. NAS.com. CONFIDENTIAL.*
